prayer.errorLoading: An error occurred while loading data
prayer.offlineMessage: Internet connection is required to see prayer times. Last known times will load when connected.

tracking.motivationPerfect: Perfect! You prayed all prayers today. May Allah accept.
tracking.motivationGreat: Great! You prayed {{count}} of {{total}} prayers today. Let's continue, insha'Allah.
tracking.motivationSteady: Consistency is valuable. You prayed {{count}} of {{total}} prayers today. Let's continue, insha'Allah.
tracking.motivationStarted: Good start. You prayed {{count}} prayers today. Let's continue, insha'Allah.
tracking.motivationNotStarted: You haven't prayed today yet. Let's start, insha'Allah.

adhan.offlineMessage: Internet connection is required to load prayer times. When connected, the last known times will be shown.

more.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to log out?

settings.title: Settings
settings.notificationsOff: Notifications are off. You can enable them in system settings.

language.restartMessage: Language changed. The app will restart to apply.

onboarding.welcomeMessage: Let's get started in a few steps for prayer times, Quran and more.
onboarding.locationDescription: We need your location for accurate prayer times and qibla direction. We respect your privacy.
onboarding.notificationsDescription: Allow notifications for prayer times and reminders. Adhan sound can play with notifications.

common.stalePrayerTimesModalTitle: Prayer times are out of date
common.stalePrayerTimesModalMessage: You haven't been online for {{days}} days. Connect to the internet for up-to-date prayer times.

notification.prayerTimeBody: {{prayerName}} has been called. Come to prayer for the sake of Allah.
notification.prayerLateReminderBody: Did you pray {{prayerName}}? The next prayer is soon; pray when you can.
notification.streakBody: Mashallah, you have prayed {{count}} days in a row. Keep it up. May Allah accept.
notification.stalePrayerTimesTitle: Prayer times are out of date
notification.stalePrayerTimesBody: You haven't been online for 7 days. Connect to the internet for up-to-date prayer times.

auth.signInError: A problem occurred while signing in. Please try again.
auth.forgotPasswordMessage: Check your inbox for the password reset link.
auth.invalidEmailMessage: Enter a valid email for password reset.
auth.guestSignInError: A problem occurred with guest sign in. Please try again.
